final:
module d_flip_flop (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Q <= ~D; if (RST) begin Q <= 1; end
    end
  end

endmodule
